title: Lineage Ritual
description: Cross-encounter offspring legacy ritual contract. Game/ + Godot v2 + evo-swarm CO-02 v0.3 compliant. Sprint Q+ Q-1 (forbidden path master-dd grant 2026-05-10 sera Phase B Path γ accepted).

id.description: Offspring unique ID (UUID v4 generated server-side).

lineage_id.description: Chain identifier cross-encounter (parent_a.lineage_id || parent_b.lineage_id || NEW UUID).

mutations.description: Subset 3-of-6 canonical mutations. LegacyRitualPanel.gd surface user choice. Master-dd verdict 2026-05-08 6-canonical.

trait_inherited.description: Trait IDs inherited dal parent dominante (Q-3 propagateLineage logic). Default empty array. Cap 6 per anti-bloat.

biome_origin.description: Biome ID encounter origin (e.g. dorsale_termale_tropicale). Nullable se encounter biome unknown.
